corelogic_v10431

For Boolean variables $p,q,r,s,t,u\in\{0,1\}$ write
• $p\to q=\lnot p\lor q$ (material implication) 
• $p\oplus q=1$ iff $p\ne q$ (exclusive–or).

Define two predicates
$$
\begin{aligned}
G(p,q,r,s,t,u)\; &=\; \bigl[(p\oplus q)\oplus(r\to s)\bigr]\land\bigl[(s\oplus t)\to((\lnot p)\oplus r)\bigr],\\[4pt]
H(p,q,r,s,t,u)\; &=\; \bigl[(q\to r)\oplus(p\land u)\bigr]\land\bigl[(s\lor t)\oplus(\lnot r)\bigr].
\end{aligned}
$$

---

**Stage A.** Collect every valuation with
$$
G(p,q,r,s,t,u)=1,\qquad p+q+r+s+t+u\text{ even}.
$$
For each such 6-tuple set
$$
M=32p+16q+8r+4s+2t+u,\qquad
S_G=\sum(7M^{2}+9).
$$

**Stage B.** Collect every valuation with
$$
H(p,q,r,s,t,u)=1,\qquad p+q+r+s+t+u\ge 3.
$$
For each such 6-tuple set
$$
N=32p+16q+8r+4s+2t+u,\qquad
S_H=\sum(5N+11).
$$

Finally compute
$$
\Delta=(S_G-S_H)\pmod{1009}.
$$

724
